channel.title: waapply
channel.description: Artificial Intelligence news updates from waapply.

item.title: Do AI Agent Costs Grow Exponentially? I Ran My Logs and the Answer Surprised Me
item.description: A Hacker News thread with 208 points asks whether AI agent costs grow exponentially. I have months of real production logs. The answer isn't what anyone?

item.title: AI Agents Generate Code That Passes Your Tests. That Is the Problem.
item.description: AI coding agents excel at writing code that satisfies your test suite and at writing tests that game coverage metrics. Here is why your coverage numbers are?

item.title: The AI Agent Ecosystem Needs a Public Market Layer
item.description: The AI Agent Ecosystem Needs a Public Market Layer ? Most of the AI agent ecosystem is still hard to search, hard to compare, and even harder to...

item.title: Promising Artificial Intelligence Stocks To Watch Today - April 18th
item.description: Hut 8, Tempus AI, SoundHound AI, Upstart, and BigBear.ai are the five Artificial Intelligence stocks to watch today, according to MarketBeat's stock screener?

item.title: Meta layoffs: 16,000 jobs on the line as Mark Zuckerberg plans major cuts in looming workforce shake-up
item.description: Meta is set to cut 16,000 jobs soon. The first phase begins May 20, affecting 8,000 workers. This major restructuring follows the company's strong push into?

item.title: Starbucks now lets you pick your drink based on your mood using ChatGPT
item.description: You can describe a craving, share a photo or type a feeling and get a personalized drink suggestion. Some wonder what it means for the barista experience.

item.title: 5 Chillingly Accurate Movies That Seemingly Foresaw the Rise of AI
item.description: From "2001: A Space Odyssey" to "Her," these movies predicted the emergence of seemingly sentient chatbots. Artificial intelligence has evolved at a rapid?

item.description: Rep. Ro Khanna put the world's richest man on the spot on Friday after Elon Musk acknowledged that artificial intelligence and robotics advancements in the?

item.title: Steve Bannon says Anthropic 'had it right' in rejecting deal with the Pentagon
item.description: During the Semafor World Economy Summit, Steve Bannon said we need to better understand how weapon manufacturers will use AI. At least one person in Trump?

item.title: Iconiq, Go-To Wealth Adviser for Tech?s Elite, Is Putting Billions Into AI
item.description: Last year, Anthropic PBC chief Dario Amodei and a handful of executives traveled 8,000 miles from San Francisco to the Middle East. Photos of Amodei and...?

item.title: AI chipmaker Cerebras set to file for IPO as soon as today
item.description: Through the public offering, Cerebras could be worth three times more than what it was in a 2025 funding round, one person said. Cerebras, a producer of chips?

item.title: NVIDIA Stock Climbs 1.2% to $200 as AI Demand Fuels Continued Momentum in Chip Sector
item.description: NVIDIA Corp. shares rose more than 1% Friday, climbing to $200.67 in midday trading on the Nasdaq as investors continued to bet on the company's dominance in?
